Richteria, also known as Richteria radiata, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Compositae), known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, with its health benefits attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Richteria include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Richteria is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
